summary: Made a minimal seam pass to reduce opening duplication with chapter 5, resolve the Thursday work-schedule conflict against chapter 7's opening, and tighten the handoff into Thursday without changing chapter-level beats.
edits: Reframed the opening around Lena's morning sink-and-balance check instead of restaging the prior chapter's glowing receipt image.
Moved Farah's added close shift from Thursday to Friday so chapter 6 no longer collides with chapter 7's Thursday setup.
Adjusted late-chapter money references to match the Friday shift while preserving Lena's financial pressure.
Added a light final-line bridge that keeps Thursday present in Lena's text thread before chapter 7.
